name: ms-dropshipping-market-research
description: High-ticket Shopify dropshipping niche research for Claude Code. Bundles the /ms-dropshipping-market-research skill AND the niche-research Python engine CLI. Produces evidence-cited opportunity briefs with a multi-criteria rubric (demand with 24-36mo seasonality, competition with marketplace bestseller intel, supply verification, traffic sizing, community needs from Reddit + marketplace reviews).
